testcase.name: test_get_categories_by_group

failure.message: AssertionError: Categories endpoint should exist: 403 assert 403 == 200 + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_bulk_category_scope.py:155: in test_get_categories_by_group assert response.status_code == 200, f"Categories endpoint should exist: {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Categories endpoint should exist: 403 E assert 403 == 200 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_get_filters

failure.message: AssertionError: Filters endpoint should exist: 404 assert 404 == 200 + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_bulk_category_scope.py:174: in test_get_filters assert response.status_code == 200, f"Filters endpoint should exist: {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Filters endpoint should exist: 404 E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
